description:
Come along with me as I spend a week traveling Germany by rail.
Adventures on INSTAGRAM ▷ http://www.instagram.com/photoallison
My website ▷ http://www.allisonanderson.com

Business inquiries ▷ allison@allisonanderson.com

Huge thank you to Germany National Tourism and Deutsche Bahn for partnering with me for this video! https://gruen.deutschebahn.com/en
